title: Values, Expressions, Names, and Types · Program Brief: Python Type Inspection
summary: Build a transparent unit and budget calculator whose intermediate values can be inspected and tested. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python type inspection increment in an inspectable unit and budget calculator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inspect runtime types and supported operations without treating type names as user-facing validation.
Use Boolean values and None as distinct domain states instead of ambiguous numeric or text sentinels.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
